tldr: Alex Aranburu (Cofidis) won an uphill finale on home Basque roads, four seconds clear of Tobias Halland Johannessen. The GC stayed Seixas-shaped.

narrative.headline: Aranburu wins at home
narrative.body: Cofidis's Basque rider Aranburu took a stage on home roads, the kind of result the team's calendar is built around. Johannessen second again, his third top-5 of the week.

gcImpact.headline: Seixas defends
gcImpact.body: Seixas in the front, no GC change.
